queries.query: What retrieval method does this paper propose?
queries.answer: The paper proposes a dense dual-encoder retrieval model for scientific QA [S1]. It also claims large improvements on every benchmark [S1].

claims.text: The paper proposes a dense dual-encoder retrieval model for scientific QA.
claims.evidence_text: We propose a dense dual-encoder retrieval model for scientific question answering.
claims.label: supported

claims.text: It also claims large improvements on every benchmark.
claims.evidence_text: We observe gains on two of the three evaluation benchmarks.
claims.label: unsupported
